ddls:
CREATE TABLE "project_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial goal category */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial goal category */,
  "goal_threshold_low" INTEGER /* Lower financial threshold for the goal category */,
  "goal_threshold_high" INTEGER /* Upper financial threshold for the goal category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project goal category */,
  "successful_projects" INTEGER /* Number of successful projects */,
  "failed_projects" INTEGER /* Number of failed projects */,
  "canceled_projects" INTEGER /* Number of canceled projects */,
  "total_projects" INTEGER /* Total number of projects evaluated */,
  "percentage_successful" REAL /* Percentage of successful projects */,
  "percentage_failed" REAL /* Percentage of failed projects */,
  "percentage_canceled" REAL /* Percentage of canceled projects */,
  "average_project_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of projects in days */,
  "average_budget_spent" REAL /* Average budget spent on projects */,
  "average_budget_overrun" REAL /* Average percentage of budget overrun */,
  "average_resource_utilization" REAL /* Average resource utilization percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES project_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, analyst, executive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project goal category */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred by the project */,
  "percentage_complete" REAL /* Percentage of project completion */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES project_goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_failures" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the failed project */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for project failure */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the failure was reported */,
  "detailed_reason" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the reason for project failure */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the failure on the project and the organization */,
  "mitigation_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken to mitigate the failure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_failures_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the canceled project */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for project cancellation */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the cancellation was reported */,
  "detailed_reason" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the reason for project cancellation */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the cancellation on the project and the organization */,
  "mitigation_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken to mitigate the cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_cancellations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Settings and configurations stored in JSON format */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES project_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
